name: vibe-label
description: Generate a factual code-change label in English or Simplified Chinese from a local Git diff.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a Git diff into a shareable code label.
interface.longDescription: Creates English or Simplified Chinese labels with verifiable change facts, checks, sensitive areas, and added-line patterns without uploading source code.
defaultPrompt: Generate a safe VibeLabel for my current Git changes.
Create a VibeLabel for my staged changes.
为当前改动生成一张中文 VibeLabel。
